det_reference_script:
prev := (#MeetingRoom #Door).Door_DoorState
 
curr = (#MeetingRoom #Door).Door_DoorState

if (prev != "open" and curr == "open") {

    (#Light).LevelControl_MoveToLevel(100, 0)

    delay(10 SEC)

    (#Light).Switch_Off()

}

prev = curr
